name: Markus Hoffmann
title: Sachbearbeiter Vergabe (Procurement Officer)
organization: Bayerisches Staatsministerium für Wohnen, Bau und Verkehr
organization_type: State ministry, processes large infrastructure tenders

daily_reality.typical_day: Manages 8-12 active Vergabeverfahren simultaneously. Creates Bewertungsmatrizen from Bekanntmachung criteria. Collects Wertungsbögen from Fachgutachter (technical evaluators). Consolidates scores. Drafts Vergabevermerk. Answers Bieter-Rückfragen during Angebotsfrist.
daily_reality.biggest_time_waste: Consolidating scores from 5 different Fachgutachter who each use slightly different Excel formats. Copy-paste errors. Version control nightmares. Wertungsbogen coming in late.
daily_reality.weekly_volume: Active on 3-4 evaluations simultaneously, processes ~15 individual Wertungsbögen per week

psychology.tech_savviness: medium — competent but constrained by ministry IT policies
psychology.decision_speed: process-driven — follows checklists, doesn't skip steps
frustration_triggers: tool doesn't match our Wertungsmethode (Richtwertmethode, UfAB, Schulnotensystem)
Fachgutachter can't access the tool (ministry firewall)
delight_triggers: automatic score consolidation from multiple evaluators

first_screen: My active Verfahren listed by deadline urgency
Status per Verfahren (waiting for scores, complete, ready for Zuschlag)
deal_breakers: Requires software installation (ministry IT won't allow)
expectations.current_pain_level: 9/10 — managing 5 evaluators via email and Excel is a daily nightmare
